_comment: Main_6_train_evaluate_SimpleNN_full_profile.ipynb — PyTorch SimpleNN, full axial profile. Keys consumed: top-level test_size/random_state; runtime.* (read early, Section 2, before neural_network.*/tuning.* which are read in Section 3); neural_network.* (architecture + training); neural_network.tuning.* (Optuna Section 6b, only when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True). See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.

runtime._comment: Read in Section 2 (Paths & Flags), ahead of the main config load, because thread pools must be configured before any data operations. subsample_max_rows: cap when SUBSAMPLE_ROWS=True. n_cpu_cores: null = use all logical CPUs. optuna_n_jobs: parallel Optuna trials in Section 6b (keep 1 on a single GPU).

neural_network._comment: h1-h3: hidden layer widths. Omitted keys use notebook fallbacks.

tuning._comment: Optuna (Section 6b) when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True. n_trials / epochs_per_trial / validation_fraction / timeout_seconds (null = no cap).
